author: Sredder
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed9 minutes agoReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by Sredder on9 minutes agoInterestingly we almost signed Iraola as a PLAYER 13 years ago.Late in 2013, Liverpool were looking for an experienced right-back to augment a squad that was developing nicely under Brendan Rodgers. Spanish contacts alerted them to the potential availability of Andoni Iraola. He was 31, a Spain international and one of the best defenders in La Liga.Michael Edwards, then Liverpool’s head of technical performance, had one of his key scouts, Julian Ward, make contact with Iraola’s camp, and Ward travelled to watch Iraola lead Athletic Bilbao to victory away to Málaga. Ward had seen enough to open a dialogue with the player and Iraola was interested. He had six months left on his contract and let Ward know he would either renew or come to Anfield in the January transfer window.After agonising, Iraola elected to extend his deal with Athletic.@jnorthcroft
